# Guarantee Boundaries

## What cannot be guaranteed

Organic virality cannot be guaranteed because recommendation systems are personalised, competitive, time-sensitive, and probabilistic.

Do not claim:

```text
This video will go viral.
This hook always works.
This platform will push the video.
This format guarantees followers.
```

## What can be guaranteed

### G1 — Execution guarantee

If the calendar is followed, the system can guarantee a fixed number of published tests.

Example:

```text
20 videos in 30 days
5 first-frame variants
5 hook variants
5 text variants
5 CTA variants
```

### G2 — Measurement guarantee

Every post must have:

```text
hypothesis ID
method code
primary metric
guardrail metric
24h / 72h / 7d / 30d readout
decision rule
```

### G3 — Learning guarantee

Every batch must end with one of these outcomes:

```text
scale mechanism
replicate mechanism
rewrite mechanism
kill mechanism
move mechanism to different platform/surface
```

### G4 — Quality guarantee

No video ships unless it passes the preflight quality gates.

### G5 — Exposure guarantee

Organic exposure cannot be guaranteed. Exposure can be guaranteed by adding controlled distribution:

```text
paid micro-seeding
email/newsletter
community post
creator collaboration
partner repost
owned profile/pinned placement
cross-platform repost with native adaptation
```

### G6 — Robustness guarantee

A winning mechanism is not considered reliable until it survives:

```text
3 executions
2 time windows
2 audience conditions or platforms where possible
no major trust/negative-feedback failure
```

## The honest guarantee

```text
We cannot guarantee a viral post.
We can guarantee a system that discovers, validates, and scales mechanisms faster than random posting.
```
